title: Artificial Seawater Based AMP1 Medium Preparation
author: Bonnie Poulos
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.c9mz45
materials: Primary Trace Metal Stocks (ZnSO₄, CoCl₂, MnCl₂, Na₂MoO₄, NaSeO₃, NiCl₂)
Dispense into 500 ml acid-washed polycarbonate bottles.
Weigh out 0.2175 g Na₂EDTA·2H₂O using dust free paper. Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid disodium salt dihydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E4884
Weigh out 0.16 g FeCl₃·6H₂O using dust free paper. Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Adjust volume to 50 ml mark with MQ-water.

steps.title: Dissolve Initial Salts
steps.instruction: Dissolve each salt completely before adding the next one. Refer to table in guidelines for full list of salts.

steps.title: Adjust NaH₂PO₄ pH
steps.instruction: pH NaH₂PO₄ to 7.5 using 1M NaOH. About 8ml for 100ml volume. Prepare each one separately.

steps.title: Filter Sterilize NaH₂PO₄ Solution
steps.instruction: Filter sterilize each solution using 0.2 µm syringe filter into new, sterile 50ml centrifuge tubes or acid washed and sterile polycarbonate bottles.

steps.title: Store NaH₂PO₄ and Dispense
steps.instruction: Store at 4°C. Dispense 250 µl of each per 500 ml bottle of Turk's Island Salt Mix when preparing final medium.

steps.title: Adjust HEPES pH
steps.instruction: pH HEPES to 7.5 using 1M NaOH. About 9 ml for 50 ml volume. Prepare each one separately. HEPES Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP310

steps.title: Filter Sterilize HEPES Solution
steps.instruction: Filter sterilize each solution using 0.2 µm syringe filter into new, sterile 15 or 50 ml centrifuge tubes or acid washed and sterile polycarbonate bottles.

steps.title: Store HEPES & NaHCO₃ Note
steps.instruction: Store at 4°C. The NaHCO₃ should be made monthly.

steps.title: Dispense NaHCO₃ and HEPES
steps.instruction: Dispense 5 ml of NaHCO₃ and 0.5 ml HEPES per 500 ml bottle of Turk's Island Salt Mix when preparing final medium.

steps.title: Transfer EDTA to Volumetric Flask
steps.instruction: Transfer to acid washed 50 ml volumetric flask filled with 40 ml MQ-water.

steps.title: Dissolve EDTA
steps.instruction: Dissolve EDTA by inverting flask several times. May have to heat 5 min. at 80°C to dissolve.

steps.title: Dissolve Iron Chloride
steps.instruction: Dissolve iron chloride into same volumetric flask by inverting several times.

steps.title: Add Trace Metal Stocks
steps.instruction: Individually add and dissolve 50 µl each of the ZnSO₄, CoCl₂, MnCl₂, Na₂MoO₄, NaSeO₃, and NiCl₂ Primary Trace Metal Stocks.

steps.title: Filter Trace Metal Stock
steps.instruction: Filter through a 0.2 µm syringe filter into sterile, acid washed container in laminar flow hood.

steps.title: Dispense Trace Metal Mix
steps.instruction: Dispense 5 µl Stock Trace Metal Mix to 500 ml bottle of Turk's Island Salt Mix when preparing final medium.
